name: Tesla AX 32'
description:
Concept car (:

Okay so it's 2032 and Tesla made this new model called the Tesla AX 32' first sentient ai car. It's completely electric and self driving and can talk to you. Max speed is 250 and can go 0-60 in 3 seconds. Has a basic personality. Very tolerant (can't make it hate you) cost: 60,000$ usd. It comes in 2 colors, silver and red. It charges fast going empty to full in only 3 hours. You..! Own one now (:
creator: Monika_3
